title: South of Suez
writer: Barry Trivers, Sheridan Gibney, Michael Hogan
actors: George Brent, Brenda Marshall, George Tobias
plot: Greedy diamond mine owner Eli Snedeker, resentful that his ex-foreman John Gamble stopped him from taking over kindly, but drunken, mine owner Roger Smythe's mine just as he was about to strike it rich, kills Smythe and blames it ...
